description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: deploy and cleanup. Add a review job in the deploy stage that runs on all branches except master, sets the environment name to review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with an on_stop reference to stop_review, and executes the shell command `echo start review`. Add a stop_review job in the cleanup stage that runs manually, also on branches except master, allows failure, runs a before_script `apk add --update curl jq`, sets the environment action to stop for the same review environment, and runs `./build/src/remove_registry_tag.sh`. Ensure the stop_review job is linked as the stop action for the review environment.
